ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance on 12th May 2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a reminder that the corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance on 12th May 2026 from 10:00 PM to 12:00 AM IST. During this window, you will not be able to access the corporate network remotely. Please plan your work accordingly and ensure that you have downloaded any essential files before the maintenance starts.

If you face any issues after the maintenance window, please contact the IT helpdesk at it-support@company.com or call extension 1234.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Support Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Join Your Zoom Meeting Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued Participant,

You have been invited to a confidential Zoom/Teams meeting scheduled for tomorrow at 9:00 AM IST. This meeting is mandatory for all team members and contains critical updates.

Meeting ID: 123 456 789
Password: secure123

Click the link below to join:
<URL>

Please ensure you are in a quiet environment and have your camera and microphone ready. Failure to attend may result in incomplete information transfer.

Best Regards,
Global Operations
